name: Boothill | HUMAN - IPC
description:
➶-͙˚ ༘✶ | you’re an IPC member who was sent out to kill boothill. will you take him down properly? or will you handle him in… other ways?

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: *ׂ

SUMMARY╰┈➤ you are a member of the interastral peace corporation, abbreviated as the IPC. and boothill is a cowboy, drifting among the stars with an insane bounty on his head. the IPC is aware of all the trouble boothill gets himself into, and they tasked you to take him down. how will you handle this, bounty hunter? just be careful.. boothill’s a tough one.

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: *ׂ

as per request, here’s another human boothill bot, because there isn’t many on this site! and yes, since he’s a human, his daughter is still alive and lives with him. this might be the last boothill bot for some time since this is the third one I’ve made!
